title: Robustly Fermented Russian Chicken Wings Kebabs
description: Grassy, pillowy, brunch-mood Russian dish featuring chicken wings, ferment, low-fat-friendly, served in an agave leaf vessel. This recipe is perfect for a unique snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, dill, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to make the marinade.
Add the chicken wings to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 24 hours to allow the chicken to ferment.
Preheat a grill to medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and thread onto skewers.
Brush the agave leaves with water and place a skewer in the center of each leaf.
Fold the leaves over the chicken to form a packet and secure with toothpicks.
Grill the packets for 20-25 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
